metadata.title: Custom new file name
metadata.description: Custom new file name Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Define the format for new file names. You can use "{{datetime:YYYYMMDDHHmmss}}" to include the current date and time in your format.
ast.target: 定义新文件名的格式。您可以使用 \"{{datetime:YYYYMMDDHHmmss}}\" 在格式中包含当前日期和时间。
